mapper.sql: c.id, c.owner_user_id as ownerUserId, c.title, c.region_name as regionName, c.visibility, c.status, c.description, c.cover_image_url as coverImageUrl, c.curation_section as curationSection, c.curation_order as curationOrder, ( select count(*) from course_saves s where s.course_id = c.id ) as saveCount, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt, c.deleted_at as deletedAt

s.course_id as courseId, s.from_course_item_id as fromCourseItemId, s.to_course_item_id as toCourseItemId, s.segment_order as segmentOrder, s.travel_mode as travelMode, s.duration_seconds as durationSeconds, s.distance_meters as distanceMeters

i.id, i.course_id as courseId, i.item_type as itemType, i.attraction_id as attractionId, i.note_id as noteId, i.position, i.day, i.memo, i.stay_minutes as stayMinutes, a.title as attractionTitle, n.title as noteTitle, case i.item_type when 'ATTRACTION' then a.title when 'NOTE' then n.title end as itemTitle, n.author_user_id as noteAuthorUserId, i.created_at as createdAt
c.visibility = 'PUBLIC' and c.status = 'READY' and c.deleted_at is null
a.status = 'ACTIVE' and a.deleted_at is null and a.duplicate_of_attraction_id is null
n.visibility = 'PUBLIC' and n.status = 'ACTIVE' and n.deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into courses ( id, owner_user_id, title, region_name, visibility, status, description, cover_image_url, curation_section, curation_order, created_at ) values ( #{id}, #{ownerUserId}, #{title}, #{regionName}, #{visibility}, #{status}, #{description}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{curationSection}, #{curationOrder}, current_timestamp )
mapper.select: select from courses c where c.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} and c.deleted_at is null order by c.created_at desc, c.id asc
select from courses c join members m on m.user_id = c.owner_user_id where m.role = 'ADMIN' and c.deleted_at is null order by c.updated_at desc nulls last, c.created_at desc, c.id asc
mapper.update: update courses set title = #{title}, region_name = #{regionName}, visibility = #{visibility}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, curation_section = #{curationSection}, curation_order = #{curationOrder}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} and deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into course_items ( course_id, item_type, attraction_id, note_id, position, day, memo, stay_minutes, created_at ) values ( #{courseId}, #{itemType}, #{attractionId}, #{noteId}, #{position}, #{day}, #{memo}, #{stayMinutes}, current_timestamp )
mapper.select: select id, course_id as courseId, position from course_items where course_id = #{courseId} order by position asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into course_route_segments ( course_id, from_course_item_id, to_course_item_id, segment_order, travel_mode, duration_seconds, distance_meters ) values ( #{courseId}, #{fromCourseItemId}, #{toCourseItemId}, #{segmentOrder}, #{travelMode}, #{durationSeconds}, #{distanceMeters} )
mapper.select: select from course_route_segments s where s.course_id = #{courseId} order by s.segment_order asc
select from course_items i left join attractions a on a.id = i.attraction_id left join notes n on n.id = i.note_id where i.course_id = #{courseId} order by i.position asc, i.id asc

select from course_items i left join attractions a on a.id = i.attraction_id left join notes n on n.id = i.note_id where i.course_id = #{courseId} and ( (i.item_type = 'ATTRACTION' and ) or (i.item_type = 'NOTE' and ) ) order by i.position asc, i.id asc
select from courses c where and c.curation_section = 'MD_RECOMMENDED' order by c.curation_order asc nulls last, c.updated_at desc nulls last, c.id asc limit #{limit}
select from courses c where order by ( select count(*) from course_saves s where s.course_id = c.id ) desc, c.updated_at desc nulls last, c.id asc limit #{limit}
